V5_MENU_BOOT_FOCUSED_SLICES

===== loadState at line 1735 =====
001735: function loadState() {
001736:         const base = defaultState();
001737:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.storageState) || SCRIPT.oldStorageKeys.map(key => localStorage.getItem(key)).find(Boolean);
001738:         if (!raw) return base;
001739: 
001740:         try {
001741:         return normaliseLoadedState(JSON.parse(raw), base);
001742:         } catch (err) {
001743:         return base;
001744:         }
001745:     }

===== normaliseOperationalWindowSettings: NOT FOUND =====
===== installOperationalSuiteShell at line 23101 =====
023101: function installOperationalSuiteShell() {
023102:         if (operationalSuiteInstalled) {
023103:             if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
023104:             return;
023105:         }
023106:         operationalSuiteInstalled = true;
023107:         runtime.operationalSuite = Object.freeze({
023108:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE,
023109:             settingsVersion: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_SETTINGS_VERSION,
023110:             phase: 'operational-suite',
023111:             schedule: scheduleOperationalSuiteScan,
023112:             contextCount: () => operationalSuiteContexts.size
023113:         });
023114:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
023115:             runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
023116:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
023117:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
023118:             if (runtime.operationalSuite?.phase === 'operational-suite') delete runtime.operationalSuite;
023119:         });
023120:         if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
023121:     }

===== operationalSuiteEnabled at line 23006 =====
023006: function operationalSuiteEnabled() {
023007:         return state.operationalWindow?.enabled === true;
023008:     }

===== scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup at line 31058 =====
031058: function scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup(delay = STARTUP_OPERATIONAL_DELAY_MS) {
031059:         if (operationalStartupStarted || runtime.destroyed) return;
031060:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(() => {
031061:             runDeferredOperationalStartup().catch(err => {
031062:                 operationalStartupComplete = true;
031063:                 startupDataPassActive = false;
031064:                 console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Deferred startup recovered after an operational initialisation error.`, err);
031065:                 connectMainMutationObserver();
031066:             });
031067:         }, STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS), Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
031068:     }

===== ensureUi at line 30723 =====
030723: function ensureUi() {
030724:         const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
030725:         if (settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) createPanel();
030726:         if (mapEl) {
030727:             createControl(mapEl);
030728:             ensureVersionStatusButton();
030729:             const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
030730:             if (state.economyMode && map) { applyLeafletEconomyPolicy(map); scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0); }
030731:             if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
030732:             else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
030733:             const payoutOverlay = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.payoutFlashId);
030734:             if (payoutOverlay?.classList.contains('mcms-payout-active')) positionPayoutFlashOverlay(payoutOverlay, mapEl);
030735:         }
030736:         return Boolean(mapEl && document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
030737:     }

===== createControl at line 29737 =====
029737: function createControl(mapEl) {
029738:         if (!mapEl || document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId)) return;
029739:         const control = document.createElement('div');
029740:         control.id = SCRIPT.controlId;
029741:         control.className = 'mcms-control';
029742:         control.setAttribute('aria-label', `${SCRIPT.name} control`);
029743:         control.innerHTML = `
029744:             <div class="mcms-launch-row">
029745:                 <div class="mcms-shell">
029746:                     <button class="mcms-menu-btn" type="button" title="Open or close toolkit settings" aria-label="Open or close toolkit settings" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="${SCRIPT.panelId}">🗺️</button>
029747:                     <button class="mcms-dock-toggle-btn" type="button" title="Collapse command bar" aria-label="Collapse command bar" aria-expanded="true"><span class="mcms-dock-toggle-icon" aria-hidden="true">▴</span></button>
029748:                 </div>
029749:                 <button class="mcms-economy-btn" type="button" data-action="toggle-economy" title="Enable Economy Mode" aria-label="Enable Economy Mode" aria-pressed="false"><span aria-hidden="true">🍃</span><small>ECO</small></button>
029750:             </div>
029751:             <div class="mcms-floating-filter" title="Persistent map visibility filters">
029752:                 ${makeFloatButton('myMissions', '1', 'Personal', 'Show/hide confidently detected personal missions. Shortcut: 1', 'Personal', 'Mine')}
029753:                 ${makeFloatButton('allianceMissions', '2', 'Alliance', 'Show/hide confidently detected alliance missions. Shortcut: 2', 'Alliance', 'Ally')}
029754:                 ${makeFloatButton('vehicles', '3', 'Vehicles', 'Show/hide confidently detected vehicles. Shortcut: 3', 'Vehicles', 'Units')}
029755:                 ${makeFloatButton('buildings', '4', 'Buildings', 'Show/hide confidently detected buildings/stations. Shortcut: 4', 'Buildings', 'Bldgs')}
029756:                 ${makeFloatButton('allianceCredits', '5', 'Ally Cred', 'Show/hide approximate credit values beside alliance mission markers. Shortcut: 5', 'Ally Credits', 'Ally £')}
029757:                 ${makeFloatButton('missionAge', '6', 'Miss Age', 'Show personal mission age with progressive 8H amber, 16H orange and 24H red severity. Shortcut: 6', 'Mission Age', 'Age')}
029758:                 ${makeFloatButton('transportWatcher', '7', 'Transport', 'Show/hide amber transport-required watchers beside missions. Shortcut: 7', 'Transport', 'Trans')}
029759:                 ${makeFloatButton('unitCommitment', '8', 'Unit Count', 'Show your committed units beside missions. Shortcut: 8', 'Unit Count', 'Count')}
029760:                 ${makeFloatButton('criticalView', '9', 'Crit View', 'Show only personal missions aged 8 hours or more and frame them on the map. Shortcut: 9', 'Critical View', 'Critical')}
029761:                 ${makeActionFloatButton('open-vehicle-status', 'V', 'Veh Codes', 'Open or close Vehicle Code Status. Shortcut: V', 'Veh Codes', 'Codes')}
029762:                 ${makeActionFloatButton('open-critical-drawer', 'W', 'Age Watch', 'Open or close Mission Age Watch. Shortcut: W', 'Age Watch', 'Watch')}
029763:             </div>
029764:             <div class="mcms-screen-pins" title="Pinned screen shortcuts"></div>
029765:         `;
029766:         ['click', 'dblclick', 'mousedown', 'mouseup', 'pointerdown', 'pointerup', 'pointercancel', 'touchstart', 'touchmove', 'touchend', 'wheel', 'contextmenu'].forEach(eventName => {
029767:             control.addEventListener(eventName, stopMapInteraction, { passive: false });
029768:         });
029769:         let screenPinLongPressTimer = 0;
029770:         let screenPinLongPressButton = null;
029771:         const cancelScreenPinLongPress = () => {
029772:             runtimeClearTimeout(screenPinLongPressTimer);
029773:             screenPinLongPressTimer = 0;
029774:             screenPinLongPressButton = null;
029775:         };
029776:         control.addEventListener('pointerdown', event => {
029777:             const pinButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-screen-pin-btn[data-full-label]');
029778:             if (!pinButton || event.pointerType === 'mouse') return;
029779:             cancelScreenPinLongPress();
029780:             screenPinLongPressButton = pinButton;
029781:             screenPinLongPressTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
029782:                 if (screenPinLongPressButton !== pinButton) return;
029783:                 pinButton.dataset.mcmsLongPress = 'true';
029784:                 showToast(pinButton.dataset.fullLabel || pinButton.textContent || 'Bookmark');
029785:             }, 560);
029786:         });
029787:         control.addEventListener('pointermove', cancelScreenPinLongPress, { passive: true });
029788:         control.addEventListener('pointercancel', cancelScreenPinLongPress, { passive: true });
029789:         control.addEventListener('pointerup', () => {
029790:             runtimeClearTimeout(screenPinLongPressTimer);
029791:             screenPinLongPressTimer = 0;
029792:             screenPinLongPressButton = null;
029793:         }, { passive: true });
029794:         control.addEventListener('click', event => {
029795:             const menuButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-menu-btn');
029796:             const dockToggleButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-dock-toggle-btn');
029797:             const toggleButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-toggle]');
029798:             const actionButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-action]');
029799:             if (actionButton?.dataset.mcmsLongPress === 'true') {
029800:                 delete actionButton.dataset.mcmsLongPress;
029801:                 event.preventDefault();
029802:                 return;
029803:             }
029804:             if (menuButton) { togglePanel(); return; }
029805:             if (dockToggleButton) { toggleCommandBar(); return; }
029806:             if (toggleButton) { toggleFeature(toggleButton.dataset.toggle); return; }
029807:             if (actionButton) handleAction(actionButton);
029808:         });
029809:         control.addEventListener('contextmenu', event => { event.preventDefault(); openPanel(); });
029810:         mapEl.appendChild(control);
029811:         renderScreenPins();
029812:         updateUI();
029813:     }

===== createPanel at line 29815 =====
029815: function createPanel() {
029816:         const existingPanel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
029817:         if (existingPanel) { settingsPanelActivated = true; return existingPanel; }
029818:         const panelStartedAt = startupClock();
029819:         settingsPanelActivated = true;
029820:         const panel = document.createElement('div');
029821:         panel.id = SCRIPT.panelId;
029822:         panel.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');
029823:         panel.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'false');
029824:         panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
029825:         panel.setAttribute('aria-label', `${SCRIPT.name} menu`);
029826:         const buildUiThemeButtons = () => UI_THEME_ORDER.map(key => {
029827:             const theme = UI_THEMES[key];
029828:             return `
029829:                 <button class="mcms-ui-theme-btn" type="button" data-ui-theme="${key}" title="${escapeHtml(theme.description)}" aria-pressed="false">
029830:                     <span class="mcms-ui-theme-preview mcms-ui-theme-preview-${key}" aria-hidden="true"><span></span><span></span><span></span></span>
029831:                     <span class="mcms-ui-theme-copy"><strong>${escapeHtml(theme.label)}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(theme.short)}</small></span>
029832:                 </button>
029833:             `;
029834:         }).join('');
029835:         const buildThemeButtons = keys => keys.map(key => {
029836:             const theme = THEMES[key];
029837:             return `
029838:                 <button class="mcms-theme-btn" type="button" data-theme="${key}" title="${theme.full}">
029839:                     <span class="mcms-iconbox">${theme.icon}</span>
029840:                     <span class="mcms-text">
029841:                         <span class="mcms-label">${theme.label}</span>
029842:                         <span class="mcms-pill">${theme.short}</span>
029843:                     </span>
029844:                 </button>
029845:             `;
029846:         }).join('');
029847:         const uiThemeButtons = buildUiThemeButtons();
029848:         const coreThemeButtons = buildThemeButtons(CORE_THEME_ORDER);
029849:         const serviceThemeButtons = buildThemeButtons(SERVICE_THEME_ORDER);
029850:         const positionButtons = Object.entries(POSITIONS).map(([key, pos]) => `<button class="mcms-position-btn" type="button" data-position="${key}" title="${pos.label}">${pos.short}</button>`).join('');
029851:         panel.innerHTML = `
029852:             <div class="mcms-panel-sticky-stack">
029853:                 <div class="mcms-header">
029854:                     <div class="mcms-drag-handle" title="Hold left-click and drag this bar to move the menu">
029855:                         <span class="mcms-title">☰ DRAG MENU HERE</span>
029856:                         <span class="mcms-subtitle">Hold left-click on this title area. Position saves.</span>
029857:                     </div>
029858:                     <button class="mcms-reset-panel" type="button" data-action="panel-reset" title="Reset menu position">↺</button>
029859:                     <button class="mcms-help-button" type="button" data-action="open-help-center" title="Open searchable Help Centre" aria-label="Open searchable Help Centre">?</button>
029860:                     <button class="mcms-close" type="button" title="Close">×</button>
029861:                 </div>
029862:                 <div class="mcms-tabs">
029863:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="skins">Skins</button>
029864:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="tools">Tools</button>
029865:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="resources">Resources</button>
029866:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="ops">Ops</button>
029867:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="payouts">Payouts</button>
029868:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="discord">Finance</button>
029869:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="places">Places</button>
029870:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="settings">Settings</button>
029871:                 </div>
029872:             </div>
029873:             <section class="mcms-tab-panel" data-panel="skins">
029874:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Interface theme</div>
029875:                 <div class="mcms-ui-theme-grid">${uiThemeButtons}</div>
029876:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-ui-theme-status">Interface themes restyle the complete toolkit without changing your selected operational map skin.</div>
029877:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Core skins</div>
029878:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">${coreThemeButtons}</div>
029879:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Emergency services</div>
029880:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">${serviceThemeButtons}</div>
029881:                 <div class="mcms-status">Fire Command, Police Tactical, Medical Control and Coastal Command use lightweight local tile filters and remain compatible with map overlays.</div>

029972:                 <div class="mcms-status">Stuck detection resets its timer whenever missing requirements, patients, prisoners, progress value or your assigned-unit state changes.</div>
029973:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Session Performance</div>

030099:                 <span>Audited runtime: compact Smart Bookmark Labels, responsive modes and every interface theme remain fully preserved.</span>
030100:                 <span class="mcms-build">${SCRIPT.name} v${SCRIPT.version} · MIT · ${SCRIPT.author}</span>
030101:             </div>
030102:         `;
030103:         const tabList = panel.querySelector('.mcms-tabs');
030104:         if (tabList) tabList.setAttribute('role', 'tablist');
030105:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn').forEach(button => {
030106:             const tab = button.dataset.tab;
030107:             button.id = `mcms-tab-${tab}`;
030108:             button.setAttribute('role', 'tab');
030109:             button.setAttribute('aria-controls', `mcms-tabpanel-${tab}`);
030110:             button.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
030111:             button.tabIndex = -1;
030112:         });
030113:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-panel').forEach(tabPanel => {
030114:             const tab = tabPanel.dataset.panel;
030115:             tabPanel.id = `mcms-tabpanel-${tab}`;
030116:             tabPanel.setAttribute('role', 'tabpanel');
030117:             tabPanel.setAttribute('aria-labelledby', `mcms-tab-${tab}`);
030118:             tabPanel.hidden = true;
030119:         });
030120:         panel.addEventListener('keydown', event => {
030121:             const current = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-tab-btn');
030122:             if (!current || !['ArrowLeft', 'ArrowRight', 'Home', 'End'].includes(event.key)) return;
030123:             const buttons = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn'));
030124:             const currentIndex = Math.max(0, buttons.indexOf(current));
030125:             const nextIndex = event.key === 'Home' ? 0
030126:                 : event.key === 'End' ? buttons.length - 1
030127:                 : (currentIndex + (event.key === 'ArrowRight' ? 1 : -1) + buttons.length) % buttons.length;
030128:             event.preventDefault();
030129:             const nextButton = buttons[nextIndex];
030130:             setActiveTab(nextButton.dataset.tab);
030131:             nextButton.focus({ preventScroll: true });
030132:         });
030133:         panel.addEventListener('click', event => {
030134:             const closeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-close');
030135:             const tabButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-tab-btn');
030136:             const uiThemeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-ui-theme-btn');
030137:             const themeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-theme-btn');
030138:             const toggleButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-toggle]');
030139:             const positionButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-position-btn');
030140:             const actionButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-action]');
030141:             if (closeButton) { closePanel({ restoreFocus: true }); return; }
030142:             if (tabButton) { setActiveTab(tabButton.dataset.tab); return; }
030143:             if (uiThemeButton) { applyUiTheme(uiThemeButton.dataset.uiTheme, true); return; }
030144:             if (themeButton) { applyTheme(themeButton.dataset.theme, true); return; }
030145:             if (toggleButton) { toggleFeature(toggleButton.dataset.toggle); return; }
030146:             if (positionButton) { applyPosition(positionButton.dataset.position, true); return; }
030147:             if (actionButton) {
030148:                 event.preventDefault();
030149:                 handleAction(actionButton);
030150:                 return;
030151:             }
030152:         });
030153:         panel.addEventListener('change', event => handleSettingChange(event.target));
030154:         const dragHandle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-drag-handle');
030155:         if (dragHandle) {
030156:             dragHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startPanelDrag, true);
030157:             dragHandle.addEventListener('touchstart', startPanelDrag, { capture: true, passive: false });
030158:         }
030159:         ['click', 'dblclick', 'mousedown', 'mouseup', 'mousemove', 'wheel', 'contextmenu', 'touchstart', 'touchmove', 'touchend'].forEach(eventName => {
030160:             panel.addEventListener(eventName, event => event.stopPropagation(), { passive: false });
030161:         });
030162:         document.body.appendChild(panel);
030163:         const importInput = panel.querySelector('[data-import-config-file]');
030164:         if (importInput) {
030165:             importInput.addEventListener('change', () => {
030166:                 const file = importInput.files?.[0];
030167:                 if (file) importToolkitConfigFile(file);
030168:                 importInput.value = '';
030169:             });
030170:         }
030171:         const financeImportInput = panel.querySelector('[data-import-finance-file]');
030172:         if (financeImportInput) {
030173:             financeImportInput.addEventListener('change', () => {
030174:                 const file = financeImportInput.files?.[0];
030175:                 if (file) importFinancialArchiveFile(file);
030176:                 financeImportInput.value = '';
030177:             });
030178:         }
030179:         renderQuickPlaces();
030180:         renderBookmarks();
030181:         renderProfiles();
030182:         updateUI();
030183:         recordStartupMetric('settingsPanelBuildMs', panelStartedAt, { settingsPanelLazy: true });
030184:         return panel;
030185:     }

===== createCleanExit at line 29726 =====
029726: function createCleanExit() {
029727:         if (document.getElementById(SCRIPT.cleanExitId)) return;
029728:         const button = document.createElement('button');
029729:         button.id = SCRIPT.cleanExitId;
029730:         button.type = 'button';
029731:         button.textContent = 'Exit Clean Mode';
029732:         button.title = 'Exit clean mode. Shortcut: C or Esc.';
029733:         button.addEventListener('click', () => toggleFeature('clean'));
029734:         document.body.appendChild(button);
029735:     }

===== handleOperationalWindowSettingChange at line 23127 =====
023127: function handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target) {
023128:         const path = target?.dataset?.operationalSetting;
023129:         if (!path) return false;
023130:         try {
023131:             const type = target.dataset.operationalType;
023132:             const value = type === 'boolean' ? target.checked : type === 'json' ? JSON.parse(target.value || '[]') : target.value;
023133:             operationalFeatureSet(path, value);
023134:             state.operationalWindow = normaliseOperationalWindowState(state.operationalWindow, state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.enabled !== false);
023135:             saveState(); updateUI(); showToast('Operational Window setting saved');
023136:         } catch (error) {
023137:             showToast('Operational setting contains invalid JSON');
023138:         }
023139:         return true;
023140:     }

===== operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi at line 22759 =====
022759: function operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi(panel = operationalQuery(document, `#${SCRIPT.panelId}

===== operationalQuery at line 22683 =====
022683: function operationalQuery(root, selector) {
022684:         try { return root?.querySelector?.(selector) || null; } catch (error) { return null; }
022685:     }

===== boot at line 31426 =====
031426: function boot() {
031427:         if (runtime.destroyed || bootStarted) return;
031428:         bootStarted = true;
031429:         bootStartedAt = Date.now();
031430:         const bootPerformanceStartedAt = startupClock();
031431:         applyRootAttributes();
031432:         if (installAllianceBuildingsPageOptimisation()) return;
031433:         createCleanExit();
031434:         if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031435:         installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031436:         installRadioMessageHook();
031437:         lastObservedCredits = readCurrentCreditTotal();
031438:         installCreditsUpdateHook();
031439:         observeCreditValue();
031440:         installOperationalSuiteShell();
031441:         installCustomVehicleBadges();
031442:         startBootAttemptCoordinator(bootPerformanceStartedAt);
031443:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
031444:             if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) {
031445:                 economyDeferredDomMutation = true;
031446:                 return;
031447:             }
031448:             let externalMutationFound = false;
031449:             let addedLeafletMarker = false;
031450:             let missionChanged = false;
031451:             let layoutChanged = false;
031452:             let toolkitUiRemoved = false;
031453:             for (const mutation of mutations) {
031454:                 if (mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation)) continue;
031455:                 externalMutationFound = true;
031456:                 if (!addedLeafletMarker && mutationAddsLeafletMarkerIcon(mutation)) {
031457:                     addedLeafletMarker = true;
031458:                     missionChanged = true;
031459:                 }
031460:                 if (!missionChanged && mutationAffectsMissionData(mutation)) missionChanged = true;
031461:                 if (!layoutChanged && mutationAffectsMapLayout(mutation)) layoutChanged = true;
031462:                 if (!toolkitUiRemoved && mutationRemovesToolkitUi(mutation)) toolkitUiRemoved = true;
031463:                 if (addedLeafletMarker && missionChanged && layoutChanged && toolkitUiRemoved) break;
031464:             }
031465:             if (!externalMutationFound) return;
031466:             missionChanged ||= addedLeafletMarker;
031467:             if (!missionChanged && !layoutChanged && !toolkitUiRemoved) return;
031468:             if (addedLeafletMarker) {
031469:                 invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('all');
031470:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031471:                 if (!state.visibility.buildings) scheduleMarkerStateSync(180, true);
031472:             }
031473:             if (layoutChanged) invalidateMapElementCache();
031474:             if (document.hidden || dragState || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
031475:             runtimeClearTimeout(mutationTimer);
031476:             const startupSettling = bootStartedAt > 0 && Date.now() - bootStartedAt < STARTUP_SETTLE_WINDOW_MS;
031477:             const mutationDelay = startupSettling
031478:                 ? STARTUP_MUTATION_DEBOUNCE_MS
031479:                 : (state.economyMode ? Math.max(320, DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS) : DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS);
031480:             mutationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031481:                 if (dragState || document.hidden || runtime.destroyed || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
031482:                 const panelMissing = settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
031483:                 const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
031484:                 const controlMissing = Boolean(mapElement && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
031485:                 if (toolkitUiRemoved || panelMissing || controlMissing) ensureUi();
031486:                 if (mainMutationObserverFallbackActive && (mapElement || document.querySelector('#missions, #mission_list, .missions-panel, .mission-list'))) {
031487:                     connectMainMutationObserver();
031488:                 }
031489:                 if (layoutChanged) {
031490:                     refreshSuppression();
031491:                     fitControlToMap();
031492:                     schedulePanelPosition(true, 50);
031493:                     scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(60);
031494:                 }
031495:                 if (missionChanged) {
031496:                     scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
031497:                     scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(35);
031498:                     if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(35);
031499:                 }
031500:             }, mutationDelay);
031501:         }));
031502:         mainMutationObserver = observer;
031503:         runtimeListen(document, 'keydown', handleKeyboard);
031504:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerover', handleMissionInspectorPointerOver, true);
031505:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointermove', handleMissionInspectorPointerMove, true);
031506:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerout', handleMissionInspectorPointerOut, true);
031507:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerdown', () => unlockPayoutAudio(), { once: true, capture: true });
031508:         runtimeListen(document, 'click', event => {
031509:             runtimeSetTimeout(refreshSuppression, 0);
031510:             if (suppressNextOutsideClick) {
031511:                 event.preventDefault();
031512:                 event.stopPropagation();
031513:                 suppressNextOutsideClick = false;
031514:                 return;
031515:             }
031516:             const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
031517:             const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
031518:             if (!panel || !panel.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;
031519:             if (control && control.contains(event.target)) return;
031520:             if (panel.contains(event.target)) return;
031521:             closePanel();
031522:         }, true);
031523:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'resize', () => {
031524:             invalidateMapElementCache();
031525:             applyRootAttributes();
031526:             refreshTabletModeUi();
031527:             scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('window-resize');
031528:             const payoutOverlay = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.payoutFlashId);
031529:             if (payoutOverlay?.classList.contains('mcms-payout-active')) positionPayoutFlashOverlay(payoutOverlay);
031530:             if (dragState) return;
031531:             refreshSuppression();
031532:             fitControlToMap();
031533:             schedulePanelPosition(true, 40);
031534:             scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(30);
031535:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, mapOnly: true });
031536:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedLayout();
031537:         });
031538:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'scroll', scheduleMajorIncidentFeedLayout, { passive: true });
031539:         runtimeListen(pageWindow,'orientationchange',()=>scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('orientationchange'));
031540:         if(pageWindow.visualViewport){
031541:             runtimeListen(pageWindow.visualViewport,'resize',()=>scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('visual-viewport-resize'));
031542:             runtimeListen(pageWindow.visualViewport,'scroll',()=>{if(isTouchLayoutActive())scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('visual-viewport-scroll');},{passive:true});
031543:         }
031544:         applyVisualViewportGeometry();
031545:         scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('boot-viewport');
031546:         try {
031547:             const coarsePointerQuery = pageWindow.matchMedia?.('(any-pointer: coarse)');
031548:             if (coarsePointerQuery?.addEventListener) runtimeListen(coarsePointerQuery, 'change', () => scheduleTabletLayoutRefresh(20));
031549:         } catch (err) {}
031550:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'focus', () => {
031551:             scheduleVisualViewportStabilisation('window-focus'); if (dragState) return;
031552:             refreshSuppression();
031553:             fitControlToMap();
031554:             schedulePanelPosition(true, 40);
031555:             installRadioMessageHook();
031556:             if (vehicleDataNeeded()) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false);
031557:             if (state.economyMode) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
031558:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
031559:             scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(500);
031560:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(80);
031561:         });
031562:         const recoverUiAfterNavigation = event => {
031563:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031564:                 if (runtime.destroyed || document.hidden) return;
031565:                 invalidateMapElementCache();
031566:                 ensureUi();
031567:                 connectMainMutationObserver();
031568:                 recoverMajorIncidentFeed(event?.type || 'navigation');
031569:             }, 120);
031570:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031571:                 if (runtime.destroyed || document.hidden) return;
031572:                 recoverMajorIncidentFeed(`${event?.type || 'navigation'} settle`);
031573:             }, 650);
031574:         };
031575:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'pageshow', recoverUiAfterNavigation);
031576:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'popstate', recoverUiAfterNavigation);
031577:         runtimeListen(pageWindow, 'hashchange', recoverUiAfterNavigation);
031578:         registerBootMaintenanceTasks();
031579:         runtimeListen(document, 'visibilitychange', () => {
031580:             if (document.hidden) return;
031581:             runtimeWakeTaskScheduler(0);
031582:             ensureUi();
031583:             scheduleVersionStatusCheck(0, false);
031584:             refreshSuppression();
031585:             if (vehicleDataNeeded()) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false);
031586:             if (state.economyMode) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
031587:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: true });
031588:             if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
031589:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(80);
031590:         });
031591:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031592:             if (document.hidden || !operationalStartupComplete) return;
031593:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, mapOnly: true });
031594:         }, 2200);
031595:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
031596:             stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031597:             transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = true;
031598:             document.removeEventListener('mousemove', movePanelDrag, true);
031599:             document.removeEventListener('mouseup', endPanelDrag, true);
031600:             document.removeEventListener('touchmove', movePanelDrag, true);
031601:             document.removeEventListener('touchend', endPanelDrag, true);
031602:             document.removeEventListener('touchcancel', endPanelDrag, true);
031603:             document.documentElement.style.cursor = '';
031604:             if (document.body) document.body.style.userSelect = '';
031605:             restoreEconomyLayers();
031606:             restoreLeafletEconomyPolicy();
031607:             disposeEconomyCanvasRenderer();
031608:             runtimeClearTimeout(majorIncidentFeedLayoutTimer);
031609:             majorIncidentFeedLayoutTimer = null;
031610:             const originalBuildingVisibility = state.visibility.buildings;
031611:             try {
031612:                 state.visibility.buildings = true;
031613:                 synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility(cachedMap);
031614:             } catch (err) {
031615:                 console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Building visibility restoration skipped during teardown.`, err);
031616:             } finally {
031617:                 state.visibility.buildings = originalBuildingVisibility;
031618:             }
031619:             try { creditsValueObserver?.disconnect(); } catch (err) {}
031620:             removeMajorIncidentFeed();
031621:             clearMissionLockOnEffect();
031622:             clearAllianceCreditLabels();
031623:             clearMissionAgeLabels();
031624:             clearUnitCommitmentLabels();
031625:             clearTransportWatcherLabels();
031626:             clearResourceGapLabels();
031627:             clearStuckMissionLabels();
031628:             clearCoverageHeatmap();
031629:             if (coverageGroup) {
031630:                 try { coverageGroup.clearLayers(); coverageGroup.remove(); } catch (err) {}
031631:                 coverageGroup = null;
031632:             }
031633:             stopPayoutFlashAnimation();
031634:             disposePayoutMediaAudio();
031635:             try { payoutAudioContext?.close?.(); } catch (err) {}
031636:             clearDiscordPreviewChartUrl();
031637:             closeHelpCenter({ restoreFocus: false });
031638:             disposeVersionStatus();
031639:             helpGuideDocumentCache = '';
031640:             helpGuideLoadedAt = 0;
031641:             stopDesktopPanelWorkspaceObservation();
031642:             runtimeUntrackObserver(desktopPanelResizeObserver);
031643:             desktopPanelResizeObserver = null;
031644:             runtimeUntrackObserver(majorIncidentFeedResizeObserver);
031645:             majorIncidentFeedResizeObserver = null;
031646:             majorIncidentFeedObservedElement = null;
031647:             missionSnapshotCache.clear();

031650:             markerRegistryCache.clear();

031654:             for (const attribute of ['data-mcms-ui-theme', 'data-mc-map-skin', 'data-mcms-clean', 'data-mcms-marker-focus', 'data-mcms-mission-pulse', 'data-mcms-road-priority', 'data-mcms-compact-dock', 'data-mcms-command-bar-open', 'data-mcms-economy', 'data-mcms-map-moving', 'data-mcms-alliance-buildings-map', 'data-mcms-alliance-buildings-page', 'data-mcms-device-layout', 'data-mcms-tablet-mode', 'data-mcms-tablet-active', 'data-mcms-tablet-orientation', 'data-mcms-mobile-mode', 'data-mcms-mobile-active', 'data-mcms-mobile-orientation', 'data-mcms-show-alliance-missions', 'data-mcms-show-my-missions', 'data-mcms-show-vehicles', 'data-mcms-show-buildings', 'data-mcms-critical-view', 'data-mcms-help-open']) root.removeAttribute(attribute);
031655:         });

031657:         if (state.economyMode) runtimeSetTimeout(() => setEconomyMode(true, false), 420);
031658:         console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] v${SCRIPT.version} audited runtime ready.`);

030722: 
030723:     function ensureUi() {
030724:         const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
030725:         if (settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) createPanel();
030726:         if (mapEl) {
030727:             createControl(mapEl);
030728:             ensureVersionStatusButton();
030729:             const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
030730:             if (state.economyMode && map) { applyLeafletEconomyPolicy(map); scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0); }

031324:             attempts += 1;
031325:             installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031326:             installRadioMessageHook();
031327:             installCreditsUpdateHook();
031328:             observeCreditValue();
031329:             const ready = ensureUi();
031330:             const mapReady = Boolean(getLargestLeafletMap());
031331:             if (ready && (mapReady || attempts >= 12)) {
031332:                 recordStartupMetric('coreUiReadyMs', bootPerformanceStartedAt, { bootAttempts: attempts });
031333:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031334:                 scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup();
031335:                 scheduleVersionStatusCheck(VERSION_STATUS.bootDelayMs, false);
031336:                 runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(connectMainMutationObserver, STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS), STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS);

031481:                 if (dragState || document.hidden || runtime.destroyed || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;

031484:                 const controlMissing = Boolean(mapElement && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
031485:                 if (toolkitUiRemoved || panelMissing || controlMissing) ensureUi();

031487:                     connectMainMutationObserver();
031488:                 }

===== REFERENCES 'operationalWindowSettingsMarkup()' =====
022734:     function operationalFeatureRemove(context, prefix = '') {
022735:         const safe = String(prefix).replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/giu, '');
022736:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, safe ? `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}^="${safe}"]` : `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]`).forEach(node => node.remove());
022737:     }
022738: 
022739:     function operationalWindowSettingsMarkup() {
022740:         const groups = Object.entries(OP_BOOL_KEYS).map(([group, csv]) => `
022741:             <details class="mcms-operational-settings-group" open>
022742:                 <summary>${OP_LABELS[group]}</summary>
022743:                 ${csv.split(',').map(key => `<label class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">${operationalEscape(key.replace(/([A-Z])/gu, ' $1').replace(/^./u, value => value.toUpperCase()))}</span><input type="checkbox" data-operational-setting="${group}.${key}" data-operational-type="boolean"></label>`).join('')}
022744:             </details>`).join('');
022745:         const advanced = [
022746:             ['requirements.viewMode', 'Requirements view', 'table,text'],

030050:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Saved Map Profiles</div>
030051:                 <div class="mcms-profile-list" data-profile-list></div>
030052:                 <div class="mcms-status">Profiles store your map location, zoom, skin, visibility filters and operational overlays.</div>
030053:             </section>
030054:             <section class="mcms-tab-panel" data-panel="settings">
030055:                 ${operationalWindowSettingsMarkup()}
030056:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Device layout</div>
030057:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Mobile Mode · iOS Safari</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="mobile-mode"><option value="auto">Auto detect iPhone</option><option value="on">Always on</option><option value="off">Always off</option></select></div>
030058:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Tablet Mode</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="tablet-mode"><option value="auto">Auto detect</option><option value="on">Always on</option><option value="off">Always off</option></select></div>
030059:                 <div class="mcms-status" data-device-layout-status>Detecting device layout…</div>
030060:                 <div class="mcms-status">Mobile Mode is tuned for iPhone Safari with Tampermonkey: a map-aware 5×2 command grid in portrait, a compact single-row dock where space allows, full-width safe-area bottom sheets, 16px form controls to prevent Safari input zoom, and Visual Viewport handling for the iOS keyboard. Tablet and desktop layouts remain separate and unchanged.</div>
030061:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Dock position</div>
030062:                 <div class="mcms-position-grid">${positionButtons}</div>

023126: const MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_TRACTIVE_TYPES = Object.freeze({"84":[0,1,4],"87":[85,86,89,94],"88":[85,86,89,94]});
023127:     function handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target) {
023128:         const path = target?.dataset?.operationalSetting;
023129:         if (!path) return false;
023130:         try {
023131:             const type = target.dataset.operationalType;
023132:             const value = type === 'boolean' ? target.checked : type === 'json' ? JSON.parse(target.value || '[]') : target.value;
023133:             operationalFeatureSet(path, value);
023134:             state.operationalWindow = normaliseOperationalWindowState(state.operationalWindow, state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.enabled !== false);

030407:         fitControlToMap();
030408:         positionPanelOverlay(true);
030409:         showToast(activeDeviceLayout === 'mobile' ? 'iOS Mobile Mode active' : activeDeviceLayout === 'tablet' ? 'Tablet Mode active' : 'Desktop layout active');
030410:         return true; }
030411:     function handleSettingChange(target) {
030412:         if (handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target)) return;
030413:         const setting = target.dataset.setting;
030414:         if (!setting) return;
030415:         if (handleDeviceLayoutSettingChange(target, setting)) return;
030416:         if (setting === 'major-incident-minimum') {
030417:             state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits = MAJOR_INCIDENT_FEED_MINIMUM_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 25000;
030418:             saveState();
030419:             updateUI();

===== REFERENCES 'operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi(' =====
022754:             'callWindow.arrCategoryColors','callWindow.selectedVehicleCounterVehicleTypes',
022755:             'missionList.shareMissionTypes','missionList.eventMissions'
022756:         ].map(path => `<label class="mcms-operational-json-row"><span>${path}</span><textarea rows="2" class="mcms-input" data-operational-setting="${path}" data-operational-type="json"></textarea></label>`).join('');
022757:         return `<div class="mcms-section-label">Operational Window Suite</div><div class="mcms-status">Toolkit-native operational controls. Transport automation remains opt-in.</div><label class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Suite enabled</span><input type="checkbox" data-operational-setting="enabled" data-operational-type="boolean"></label>${groups}<details class="mcms-operational-settings-group"><summary>Sorting and advanced data</summary>${advanced}${json}</details>`;
022758:     }
022759:     function operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi(panel = operationalQuery(document, `#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) {
022760:         operationalQueryAll(panel, '[data-operational-setting]').forEach(control => {
022761:             const value = operationalFeatureValue(control.dataset.operationalSetting);
022762:             if (control.dataset.operationalType === 'boolean') control.checked = value === true;
022763:             else if (document.activeElement !== control) control.value = control.dataset.operationalType === 'json' ? JSON.stringify(value ?? []) : value ?? '';
022764:         });
022765:     }
022766:     const OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID = 'mcms-operational-feature-style';

030516:             updateUI();
030517:         }
030518:     }
030519:     function updateUI() {
030520:         applyRootAttributes();
030521:         operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi();
030522:         if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
030523:         if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(40);
030524:         else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
030525:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
030526:         const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
030527:         if (control) {
030528:             for (const pos of Object.keys(POSITIONS)) control.classList.toggle(`mcms-pos-${pos}`, state.position === pos);
